rule_name: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account

text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4794 AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Thomas Patzke SIGMA Title: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account SIGMA Description: Detects potential attempts made to set the Directory Services Restore Mode administrator password. The Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) account is a local administrator account on Domain Controllers. Attackers may change the password in order to obtain persistence.   False positives: - Initial installation of a domain controller.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account
